title: InstCombine: Try SimplifyDemandedBits on copysign signs
author: arsenm
description:
Some of the math library function implementations have a sequence
of logic operations to compute the sign bit which could be folded
out.

The DAG version already does this. The DAG version is also more
permissive and permits directly calling this on float typed values.
The IR version is not, so apply this transformation to the source of
a bitcast from integer.

Fixes #177932

tests.test_body:
define ppc_fp128 @copysign_simplify_demanded_bits_sign_ppcfp128(ppc_fp128 %mag, ppc_fp128 %sign) {
  %sign.int = bitcast ppc_fp128 %sign to i128
  %sign.mask = shl i128 1, 127
  %and.sign = and i128 %sign.int, %sign.mask
  %cast.sign = bitcast i128 %and.sign to ppc_fp128
  %result = call ppc_fp128 @llvm.copysign.ppcf128(ppc_fp128 %mag, ppc_fp128 %cast.sign)
  ret ppc_fp128 %result
}

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare ppc_fp128 @llvm.copysign.ppcf128(ppc_fp128, ppc_fp128) #0

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare float @llvm.copysign.f32(float, float) #0

define float @copysign_simplify_demanded_bits_sign_multiple_use_cast(float %mag, float %sign, ptr %ptr) {
  %sign.int = bitcast float %sign to i32
  %and.sign = and i32 %sign.int, -2147483648
  %cast.sign = bitcast i32 %and.sign to float
  store float %cast.sign, ptr %ptr, align 4
  %result = call float @llvm.copysign.f32(float %mag, float %cast.sign)
  ret float %result
}

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }

; Function Attrs: nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none)
declare float @llvm.copysign.f32(float, float) #0

define float @copysign_simplify_demanded_bits_sign_multiple_use_cast_src(float %mag, float %sign, ptr %ptr) {
  %sign.int = bitcast float %sign to i32
  %and.sign = and i32 %sign.int, -2147483648
  store i32 %and.sign, ptr %ptr, align 4
  %cast.sign = bitcast i32 %and.sign to float
  %result = call float @llvm.copysign.f32(float %mag, float %cast.sign)
  ret float %result
}

attributes #0 = { nocallback nofree nosync nounwind speculatable willreturn memory(none) }
